2.description: Network Map of Email Receipts Within Microsoft, March 2020 Notes . Colors indicate communities discovered via the maximum modularity partition. The upper image shows the entire organization (modularity = 0.82). The lower left image shows a low-modularity suborganization (modularity = 0.79) identified via a formal organizational chart; the lower right image shows a high-modularity suborganization (modularity = 0.85) identified via a formal organizational chart.
